The '''sleft-chuff''' were large airborne herbivores native to [[Taloraan/Legends|Taloraan]]. They inhabited the upper atmosphere of the planet, filling their hollow bodies with gas to keep them afloat. They grazed on clouds of single-celled plant organisms that they collected with their tentacles which were covered with feathery hairs.

Female sleft-chuffni usually gathered in herds of around a dozen, while males were solitary. The creatures were generally gentle and placid, but were known to become jittery during thunderstorms.

The sleft-chuff were domesticated by the [[Denfrandi]], who used them as both transports and as mobile homes, attaching gondolas to the creatures' undersides. Since the average sleft-chuff could carry up to fifty tons of dead weight, the Denfrandi and their homes did not present a burden to the creatures.
